name: xoji-components
title: Xoji components
description: The host surface a xoji component fragment fills: an inert template plus sandboxed hooks and handlers, rendered into the component's shadow root.

slots.description: The built-in fill for the xoji Tabs component: the mod-zero markup and behavior every app inherits and may override.
